executives.name: Brian Maher
executives.background: Mr. Maher is an economic geologist with over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry. He has held senior positions with ASARCO and Hochschild Mining and was the President and CEO of Prodigy Gold Inc.

executives.name: Chris Verrico
executives.background: Mr. Verrico has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies, including Xiana Mining Inc. and various junior exploration companies. He has extensive experience in project management and corporate development.

executives.name: Christopher Reynolds
executives.background: Mr. Reynolds has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance and administration. He is currently the CFO of Seabridge Gold Inc.

executives.name: John McConnell
executives.background: Mr. McConnell has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has been the President and CEO of Victoria Gold since 2010. Previously, he was President and CEO of Western Keltic Mines Inc. and held senior positions with De Beers Canada and Breakwater Resources Ltd.
